footer.text: Bang quan tri phong chat — Chi danh cho quan tri vien

setup.title: 🔐 Thiet Lap Lan Dau
setup.description: Khong tim thay tai khoan quan tri. Vui long tao tai khoan quan tri.

form.username_placeholder: 3-30 ky tu chu, so hoac gach duoi
form.password_placeholder: It nhat 8 ky tu voi 3+ loai ky tu

confirm.disable: Ban co chac chan muon vo hieu hoa nguoi dung nay?
confirm.reset_password: Ban co chac chan muon dat lai mat khau cua nguoi dung nay?
confirm.activate: Ban co chac chan muon kich hoat lai nguoi dung nay?

confirm.delete_message: Ban co chac chan muon xoa tin nhan nay?
confirm.clear_all: Hanh dong nay khong the hoan tac! Ban co chac chan muon xoa tat ca tin nhan?

clear.title: ⚠️ Xoa Tat Ca Tin Nhan
clear.warning: Hanh dong nay khong the hoan tac. Nhap cum tu xac nhan ben duoi.

error.admin_exists: Tai khoan quan tri da ton tai.
error.setup_username: Ten nguoi dung phai co 3-30 ky tu chu, so hoac gach duoi.
error.password_weak: Mat khau phai co it nhat 8 ky tu voi it nhat 3 trong so: chu hoa, chu thuong, so, ky tu dac biet.
error.login_required: Vui long nhap ten nguoi dung va mat khau.
error.login_invalid: Ten nguoi dung hoac mat khau khong hop le.
error.clear_confirmation: Vui long nhap cum tu xac nhan 'DELETE ALL MESSAGES'.
error.auth_required: Vui long dang nhap voi vai tro quan tri vien truoc.

success.admin_created: Da tao tai khoan quan tri thanh cong!
success.admin_exists: Tai khoan quan tri da ton tai.
success.user_disabled: Nguoi dung #{id} da bi vo hieu hoa.
success.user_activated: Nguoi dung #{id} da duoc kich hoat lai.
success.password_reset: Mat khau cua nguoi dung #{id} da duoc dat lai thanh: {pwd} (vui long chia se voi nguoi dung, ho phai doi mat khau khi dang nhap lan sau)
success.messages_cleared: Da xoa tat ca tin nhan ({count} tin nhan).
